rootCause.description: T-26a normalization was applied to document_fields.supplierCompany/buyerCompany but NOT to fields[N].value (the array that Custom tab reads for '최종값'). The two structures are disconnected in the backend response.

backend_response_structure.fields: Array of {name, field_type, value, confidence, bbox} — built from template region OCR. Custom tab shows field.value as '최종값'.
backend_response_structure.document_fields: Dict with canonical keys (supplierCompany, buyerCompany, tableRows, etc.) — built by extract_invoice_statement_fields(). T-26a normalization WAS applied here, but NOT to fields[].

details.template_field_mapping: Template TPL-31D13CF3 region field_2 has koField='공급자 상호' → fields[1].value = raw OCR '부광 약 품(주)'. document_fields.supplierCompany = '부광약품(주)' (normalized) but these are separate.
details.custom_tab_reads: OcrResultPanel.tsx shows field.value as '최종값' and field.original as 'OCR 원본'. Before this fix, both showed the raw OCR since field.original was not set.

fix.location: ocr-server/main.py — after invoice_statement extraction try-except block
fix.logic: After document_fields is populated, iterate zip(fields, region_list). For fields where region.koField matches '공급자 상호' or '공급받는자 상호', set field['original']=raw_value and field['value']=normalized_value from document_fields.
conditions: raw value differs from normalized value

unchangedFields: 공급자 사업자 번호 — bizNumber field not in koFieldMapping
공급자 주소 — address field not in koFieldMapping
공급자 성명 — representative field not in koFieldMapping

nextActions.action: 서버 재시작 후 1.jpg RunOCR 실행으로 Custom 탭 live 검증
